failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the tool result showing one qualifying item priced at $46.13 and instead answered that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available beginner Jigsaw Puzzles costing more than $45.76. The plan and tool call were correct through index 3. The ProductCatalogSearch output at index 3 returned one matching item: available=true, difficulty level=beginner, product_type=Jigsaw Puzzle, price=46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, claiming no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and is not resolved later.
